Might Guy Eight Inner Gates Funko Pop Verzamelfiguur
Itachi Uchiha The Loyal Subjects BST AXN Actiefiguur
S.H.Figuarts NAIL
products.description:
From the anime "Dragon Ball Z" comes Nail, a Namekian warrior and protector of the Grand Elder Guru, now available from S.H. Figuarts!
										S.H. Figuarts' Dragon Ball Z figures have been designed with a movable structure that allows you to recreate a wide range of imagery from the show. The cloak is made with soft parts and is also removable.
Exchangeable head parts, with expressions such as clenched teeth and shouting, also make it possible reproduce Nail's typical appearance in battle scenes. A defeated face is included as well, so you can pair it with the S.H Figuarts Frieza First Form & Frieza Pod (sold separately) to recreate the scene where Frieza rips off Nail's arm. Furthermore, there is even an arm part made with clear material that can be used for the following scene in which Nail regenerates the arm that Frieza had ripped off.
Additional head parts also come with this figure that make it possible to recreate the fusion of Nail and Piccolo when you also have the S.H. Figuarts Piccolo Proud Namekian figure (sold separately).

products.name: S.H.Figuarts KAMEN RIDER BITTER GAVV SPARKINGUMMY FORM
products.description:
"Sparkingummy! Yummy!"
From the series "Kamen Rider Gavv", Dark Shoma's transformation, Kamen Rider Gavv Sparkingummy Form, now available from S.H.Figuarts!

										The shaping of the body matches, with sharp edges all over. Rider's distinctive body shape and surface patterns are faithfully reproduced as well.
Color gradation on key areas clear parts on the head further add to how accurately it resembles what is seen on the show. The dark coloring that covers the entire body is also expressed in a finishing that aligns with the look of the actual character.
The Bitter Gavv, a mouth on his stomach, features a gimmick that makes its upper jaw open and close, as well as a rotating handle. The Sparkingummy Gochizo set inside can be attached to and removed from the beltas well. The Vrocan Spicy Gochizo on his left hip can be detached from the holder and held in his hands using the included hand parts.
Also included is the Bitter Gavvgablade, the special weapon that Kamen Rider Gavv created himself. The shape of the blade, with all its aggressive intensity, is painstakingly reproduced.
The figure's joint structure preserves the natural lines of the human body, allowing you to position the figure natural-looking poses. This also allows you to make the figure perform the impressive and ferocious actions you see in the show. You can even pull out the shoulder joints to create poses where he holds the Bitter Gavvgablade with both hands.
Display this figure together alongside other S.H. Figuarts Kamen Rider Gavv series figures (sold separately) to greatly expand the world view.

products.name: S.H.Figuarts (SHINKOCCHOU SEIHOU) MASKED RIDER STRONGER
products.description:
"The heavens are calling. The Earth is calling. The people are calling. Calling on me to defeat evil. I am the warrior of justice, Masked Rider Stronger!"

Everyone assemble! The seven Masked Rider!!
Masked Rider Stronger, the last of the Seven Riders of Glory, is finally available in the Shinkocchou Seihou series!

										The figure's shaping starts with its skeleton to create a completely faithful rendition of Masked Rider Stronger as he appeared in the show during its original run. The mask equipped huge horns "Kabuto Shock" and large compound eyes "Big Eye", and the inverted triangular massive body shape with its protector "Kabutector" covering the upper body, were shaped to ensure an accurate representation of the character. Impeccable attention to detail was paid in the design of each part of the figure, even down to the intricate wrinkles all over his body and the textured surface of the Kabutector.

The scarf, including the portion around his neck, is made entirely with fabric with new specifications in order to better capture the natural look seen on the show. Wire in the inner part of the fabric that hangs from his neck can be used to create a broad range of expressions, such as the look of the scarf fluttering in the wind.

A portion of the Kabutector that covers the figure's upper body is made of soft material. The Kabutector is divided into chest, shoulder, and hip joint sections, with each section connected by ball joints, allowing flexible movement both vertically and horizontally. The skirt portion is made with soft material as well, enabling a full range of hip joint motion. This makes even the kneeling pose he makes when unleashing his signature move Electro Fire possible.

In addition to exchangeable hand parts for his main poses, such as his self-introduction and knifehand strike, hand parts are also included to recreate his electrical energy techniques, such as the anti-magnetic ray and reverse fan. Every detail of the activation scene of Masked Rider Stronger's distinctive electricity-based techniques can be accurately recreated.
Hand parts for the hands-on-hips pose unique to Showa-era Riders are included as well. This lets you recreate his most heroic-looking standing poses. Furthermore, another set of hand parts allows you to reproduce the pose where he points at his opponent, which was one of the trademark Showa-era Rider poses. With these parts, you can recreate various scenes from the show.

To commemorate 50 years of Masked Rider Stronger, a great warrior whose glory never fades, he has now joined the ranks of the Shinkocchou Seihou series!!

products.name: THE ROBOT SPIRITS <SIDE MS> MS-06K ZAKU CANNON ver. A.N.I.M.E. -MS MUSEUM-
products.description:
"The Robot Spirits ver. A.N.I.M.E. -MS Museum-" ｓeries has begun in a form that could be called the "origin of memory".
										In order to give the mobile suits an appearance as realistic as possible, markings are created using pad printing and painting. The series features a new display base that makes your figures look their best when standing, bringing your room one step closer to becoming a mobile suit museum.
MS-06K ZAKU CANNON ver. A.N.I.M.E. is the first release of the MS Museum Series. Markings that evoke the unit's performance are expressed by pad printing and painting. The included stand boasts a luxurious design that conjures images of a mobile suit museum.

products.name: S.H.Figuarts  HARDBOILDER (FUUTO PI ANIMATED ANNIVERSARY)
products.description:
S.H. Figuarts HARDBOILDER is now available with newly sculpted effect parts to commemorate the anime adaptation of "Fuuto PI"!
										This figure features renewed body coloring for the "S.H.Figuarts HARDBOILDER" which was released in 2016. The rear back unit has been changed to a vivid metallic green color to match with the "S.H.Figuarts (SHINKOCCHOU SEIHOU) KAMEN RIDER W CYCLONE JOKER (FUUTO PI ANIMATED ANNIVERSARY)" (sold separately).
The rear back unit features metallic green coloring with different brightness levels for the top and bottom parts. Additionally, the exhaust pipe and license plate areas have been given a darker green color than the rest of the body. The license plate also recreates the "Fuuto Number" that you can see in the anime.

Newly sculpted smoke effect parts are included as well. The smoke that arises from the friction between the tires and the ground has been recreated in dynamic shaping, inspired by the anime. This lets you enjoy displays that capture the excitement of racing through Shadow Fuuto.

Pair it with the "S.H.Figuarts (SHINKOCCHOU SEIHOU) KAMEN RIDER W CYCLONE JOKER (FUUTO PI ANIMATED ANNIVERSARY)" (sold separately), and you can recreate the animation-style effect of his scarf fluttering wildly in the air as he rides.

You can also pair it with the "S.H.Figuarts (SHINKOCCHOU SEIHOU) KAMEN RIDER W CYCLONE SKULL" (sold separately) to recreate the action of Kamen Rider W Cyclone Skull from the film "Fuuto PI: The Portrait of Kamen Rider Skull".

products.name: S.H.Figuarts (SHINKOCCHOU SEIHOU) KAMEN RIDER RYUGEN BUDOU ARMS
products.description:
"Budou Arms! Dragon... Cannon... Ha ha ha!"

"KAMEN RIDER RYUGEN BUDOU ARMS" joins the Shinkocchou Seihou series with a brand-new format featuring the Arms Change system! This figure is fully compatible for swapping armor and equipment with the existing S.H.Figuarts (Shinkocchou Seihou) Kamen Rider Gaim series.

										Every detail of the Arms (armor) has been meticulously crafted, down to the intricate folds of the waist drape. The metallic green finish on both the Arms (armor) and the under-suit "Rider Wear" perfectly captures the look and feel of the drama.
The "Bukenkou" shoulder armor features two points of articulation, allowing for outward movement, while the waist drape is made with soft material to preserve articulation. You can enjoy posing Ryugen in different action poses.

This set includes the "Budou Ryuhou" (Grape Dragon Cannon), a handgun-style Arms Weapon, which can be held using dedicated hand parts for added expressiveness. Also included are newly sculpted hand parts exclusive to Ryugen, allowing for even more intense posing. The Budou Ryuhou is equipped with a sliding rear lever, the "Ryokuhou Gekitetsu," and comes with a special hand part designed to grip the lever—perfect for recreating bullet reload and special attacks!

For even more customization, a hand part for operating the Cutting Blade of "Sengoku Driver" is also included. The "Budou Lockseed" comes in two versions—standard and panel-opened—offering interchangeable display options.
The general-purpose hands included allow Ryugen to wield weapons from other S.H.Figuarts (Shinkocchou Seihou) Kamen Rider Gaim figures. You can equip the "Daidaimaru" from the "S.H.Figuarts (Shinkocchou Seihou) Kamen Rider Gaim Orange Arms" (sold separately) to recreate the unforgettable final battle!

Take customization even further by swapping in armor from the "S.H.Figuarts (Shinkocchou Seihou) Kamen Rider Gaim Orange Arms" (sold separately) or "S.H.Figuarts (Shinkocchou Seihou) Kamen Rider Baron Banana Arms" (sold separately) to create "Kamen Rider Ryugen Orange Arms" and "Kamen Rider Ryugen Banana Arms"—forms never seen in the drama! Likewise, the Budou Arms can be equipped onto Gaim or Baron, offering even more possibilities.

For ultimate authenticity, specialized compound eye parts are included, ensuring accurate proportions even for Arms Change forms like "Kamen Rider Baron Banana Arms," where the distance between the compound eyes and head armor differs.

With more Armored Riders joining the Shinkocchou Seihou lineup, the Rider Sengoku Era enters a new stage!

products.name: SAINT CLOTH MYTH EX AQUARIUS HYOGA-INHERITOR OF THE GOLD CLOTH-
products.description:
Now available from the Saint Cloth Myth EX Series is "AQUARIUS HYOGA"!
										The body features the EX Metal design used for the Bronze Saint. The Aquarius Cloth, which has been redesigned with new coloring, comes in both the anime version and the original version thigh parts!

products.name: S.H.Figuarts KAMEN RIDER GAVV CAKING FORM
products.description:
"Caking! Amazing!"

Now available from S.H.Figuarts Series is Gavv from the series 'Kamen Rider Gavv', in the form he gained new power from his new compatriots -- Kamen Rider Gavv Caking Form!
										The distinctive design with cake motif is faithfully recreated in this figure. The gorgeous coloring is reproduced with gold and metallic red dressing the white base. Two different color tones of gold are used for the body, to emphasize the differences of color on each area. PVC sheet is used for the cape on his back to ensure the appearance stays true to the drama. 
Various parts of the figure are shaped to maintain the carefully sculpted look of the character, from the intricately shaped head, which resembles a crown, to the whip accents on various parts of the body. The compound eyes are made with clear parts for an appearance very same as what is seen in the drama. 
Also included is his special weapon he uses during Caking Form, the Gavvwhipir. The whip portion is reproduced using soft material for a look similar to that in the show. Two versions of the Caking Gochizo used to transform into Caking Form are included as well: one open, loaded on Gavv's stomach, and one closed, which can be set on the Gavvwhipir. 
The figure's joint structure preserves the natural lines of the human body, allowing you to create a wide range of natural-looking poses as you wish, including actions when he is wielding the mighty Gavvwhipir.

products.name: METAL ROBOT SPIRITS <SIDE MS> WHITE GUNDAM
products.description:
The "White Gundam" that was shockingly revealed in the theatrical release of "Mobile Suit Gundam GQuuuuuX -Beginning-" is now appearing in METAL ROBOT SPIRITS in its Federation colors just after it was captured!
										Relive the shock of the Tricolor Gundam piloted with this completed figure!

products.name: S.H.Figuarts KAMEN RIDER BUFFA FEVER ZOMBIE FORM (JYAMASHIN)
products.description:
"Let the Kamen Rider hunt begin!"
From "Kamen Rider Geats" comes Kamen Rider Buffa, who has obtained the power to crush all Kamen Riders and become "Kamen Rider Buffa Fever Zombie Form (Jyamashin)", now available from S.H.Figuarts!

										This figure features a newly designed golden "God's Horn" on his head and purple "God's Wall" cape. The God's Wall is made with soft parts and can be given a fluttering motion by moving the base!
It also includes the "Cracked ID Cores" of "Kamen Rider Nadge Sparrow", "Kamen Rider Na-Go", and "Kamen Rider Hakubi". This allows users to recreate the ghoulish scene that Kamen Riders are being eliminated one after another in "Desire Royale", the game in which all the Kamen Riders are defeated.
The asymmetrical shaping of the arms and legs and the metallic color of the armor are faithfully reproduced. The gold-colored cloth Fever Cross Muleta wrapped around his left hip and hair-like area on the back of his head are also made of soft parts that can be used to create a wide range of actions. The "Berserker Claw" on the left hand has movable fingers that allows a diverse range of expression, and an exchangeable weapon-holding hand is also included. This allows the figure to hold the "Zombie Breaker".

products.name: S.H.Figuarts GUIL ARC THE DARK WARRIOR
products.description:
From the theatrical film "Ultraman Arc the Movie: The Clash of Light and Evil", the Dark Warrior Guil Arc is now avaliable!
										Supervised in detail by LSS, the modeling division of Tsuburaya Productions, this figure faithfully replicates the on-screen proportions. The sculpt precisely captures distinctive features such as the powerful pectoral muscles and robust shoulder structure. With the wide range of articulation following S.H.Figuarts standards, various dynamic action poses can be recreated. The striking black and dark silver color scheme of the body is reproduced with meticulous paintwork. Included is an effect part to recreate Guil Arc’s signature finishing move, "Guil Arc Finalize".
As a bonus, the figure also comes with a full set of parts that allows you to equip the separately sold S.H.Figuarts Galaxy Armor!
What's more, the "Arc Finalize Effect Part" and "Beam Clash Effect Parts", which can be used with the separately sold S.H.Figuarts Ultraman Arc, are included, allowing you to recreate iconic scenes from the movie!

products.name: THE ROBOT SPIRITS <SIDE MS> RGM-79R GMⅡ (A.E.U.G.) ver. A.N.I.M.E. -BALLUTE PACK-
products.description:
The main mass-produced unit in UC 0087, equipped with a ballute pack, which mobile suits use to enter the atmosphere without assistance, is now available in AEUG coloring from ver. A.N.I.M.E.!
										After the One Year War, the Earth Federation Forces developed this main mass-produced unit based on the GM, with modifications that include a retrofitted cockpit and thrusters.
In contrast to the Earth Federation Forces' red color specifications, the AEUG model has a green fuselage color and a different model number. The ballute, equipment that is used by all armies, allows mobile suits to enter the atmosphere on its own.

products.name: THE ROBOT SPIRITS <SIDE MS> RX-77-3 GUNCANNON HEAVY CUSTOM JABURO DEFENCE FORCES TYPE ver. A.N.I.M.E.
products.description:
The Earth Federation Forces' mid-range support unit is strengthened and modified. The blue heavy unit, which played a major role in the defense of Jaburo base,  is now available from ver. A.N.I.M.E. equipped with two types of cannons!
										Based on "Gun Cannon", the core block system was removed, and the armor and onboard weaponry have been improved. Units deployed at Jaburo are given a darker fuselage color than regular units. They were sent out to battle to defend against the AEUG's attack on Jaburo, and made full use of their mobility during their fight within the base.

products.name: S.H.Figuarts KAMEN RIDER VRAM PUDDING CUSTOM
products.description:
"Well... Let's do this."
The third Kamen Rider, Kamen Rider Vram Pudding Custom from "Kamen Rider Gavv" is now available from S.H.Figuarts series!

										His distinctive pudding motif is faithfully recreated in the design of this figure. The bright yellow and orange coloring is reproduced with incredible accuracy. The body is finished in matte black and gunmetal coloring, with different textures for each part of the body. The compound eyes on the head are made with clear parts for an appearance very similar to what is seen in the series.
The Vrastom Gear on the belt is also made with clear parts, and even the pudding mold that peeks out from the outside into the interior is carefully color-coded. The lever on the Vrastom Gear moves up and down as well. Exchangeable hands made for operating the lever are included, allowing you to recreate special move activation scenes.
The figure's joint structure preserves the natural lines of the human body, allowing you to position the figure in natural-looking poses. This makes it possible to recreate the eye-catching, dynamic actions that you see on the show to your liking.

Also the weapon "Vram Breaker"is included. The coloring and design of each part is reproduced with the same color-coding used on the main body, and the blade at the tip can switch between two modes: bow mode and scythe mode.
The "Vram Breaker" also comes with exchangeable parts that make it possible to pull the rear lever. The carefully crafted design also recreates the changing colors in the window.
Furthermore, by removing the Doppudding Gochizo from the belt and setting it in the "Vram Breaker", you can recreate the scenes where special moves are activated in "bow mode".
Following the release of the Gavv and Valen figures, Vram now joins them as the third main Kamen Riders in the S.H. Figuarts Kamen Rider Gavv series! From intense battles between the Riders to the three of them standing side by side, the possibilities of fun have greatly expanded!

products.name: S.H.Figuarts KAKASHI HATAKE -NARUTOP99 Exclusive Edition-
products.description:
Kakashi Hatake is now available in this NARUTOP99 Edition! 
										Voted the 5th most popular character worldwide in the NARUTOP99 poll, Kakashi is now available as a figure based on an original illustration drawn by Masashi Kishimoto. Some of the parts are newly modeled and the coloring matches the original illustration. Two throwing stars recreated in the original illustration are included in this extensive lineup!

products.name: S.H.Figuarts GALACTRON
products.description:
Civil Judgementer Galactron, coming from "Ultraman Orb" and "Ultraman Geed", is now available from S.H. Figuarts!
										●Shape & Proportions
With the cooperation of the Tsuburaya Productions Modeling Department LSS, this figure captures the overwhelming volume and intricate design of the suit as seen in the series with a height of approximately 160mm. The distinctive features of the suit are all here, from the intricately shaped head with dragon motif and mosaic-like molding of the armor, to the fibrous joints.

●Coloring
The pure white body that exudes the aura of a divine "enforcer of justice" is reproduced with stunning accuracy. Even the most minute details, down to the gold patterns on the horns, have been captured with precise coloring. The hue of the hold parts and the heavy, metallic feel of the silver parts have all been painstakingly crafted to create an overall finish with striking presence.

●Movement
The joints throughout the figure's body have high mobility while still retaining accurate proportions. The mouth can be opened and closed, the claw on the right arm can be deployed, and "Galactron Blade" on the left arm can be rotated to put the figure into an attacking state. "Galactron Shaft" that extends from the back of the head also has joints at each section for enhanced flexibility. The claw at the tip opens and closes as well, so you can recreates scenes when it grabs and picks up its opponents.

●Accessories
Exchangeable parts are included to a recreate the scene where Galactron's right arm is detached and fired. A joint is included to connect the detached right arm to" Tamashii Stage Act Humanoid "(sold separately) for display.

●Scene Re-Creation
Pair this figure with others from the S.H. Figuarts Ultraman Series (sold separately) and relive the action-packed battles from the show!

products.name: S.H.Figuarts COOLER FINAL FORM -40th Anniversary Reissue Edition-
products.description:
S.H.Figuarts Cooler, proved to be a popular favorite in the Dragon Ball Series reissue poll held to mark the 40th anniversary of "Dragon Ball", is now available as a 40th anniversary edition!
										A clear purple display stand with 40th anniversary logo is included. There is a Dragon Ball 40th anniversary logo printed on the stand and the color is inspried by "Cooler". This figure captures the look of Cooler from the film in a 190mm size. Two face parts "smasked" and "unmasked" are included to recreate his unmasked look immediate after transformation.
The figure's design follows the movable mechanism developed for the S.H. Figuarts series, allowing it to be placed into a wide range of poses despite its large body size. Pair him with  "S.H.Figuarts Super Saiyan Son Goku -Legendary Super Saiyan-[BEST SELECTION]" (sold separately) and recreate legendary Dragon Ball battle scenes!

*This product includes "S.H.Figuarts Cooler Final Form" released in August 2021 and the Dragon Ball 40th Anniversary Commemorative Display Stand Set.

products.name: S.H.MonsterArts GODZILLA (1989)-Exclusive Edition-
products.description:
The Godzilla that appeared in Godzilla vs. Biollante (1989) is now available as a San Diego Comic-Con commemorative item in this -Exclusive Edition- for S.H.MonsterArts! 
										Yuji Sakai produced the prototype, coloring, and modeling of S.H.MonsterArts Godzilla (1989), with clear parts colored to recreate the image of the light emitted from the dorsal fins in the movie. You can freely pose the figure thanks to the joint mechanism designed to avoid breaking the modeling!

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Pocket POP! Vinyl Keychains 4 cm Master Roshi (Peace Sign) Display (12)
Dragon Ball Super Clearise PVC Statue Super Saiyan Rosé Goku Black (Rerun) 19 cm
products.description: From Banpresto's "Clearise" series comes this PVC statue. It stands approx. 19 cm tall.

products.name: DRAGON BALL - Piccolo 'Super Hero' - Figurine S.H.Figuarts - 16cm
products.description:
Just in time for the new animated movie "DRAGON BALL SUPER : SUPER HERO" coming in 2022, Tamashii Nations is proud to present a new line of 4 ShFiguarts dedicated to the main chracters from the Dragonball saga.
The characters involved in thsi first launch are: Piccolo, Goku, Gohan and Vegeta. 
As always, SHfiguarts high quality standards are sure to grant extreme success to this line

products.name: Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time SPM PVC Statue Rei Ayanami Long Hair Ver. (re-run) 21 cm
products.description: From the "Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time" anime movie comes this PVC Statue. She stands 21 cm tall and comes with base in a window box packaging.

products.name: Rebuild of Evangelion PVC Statue 1/7 Rei Ayanami Long Hair Ver. 16 cm
products.description: From the popular "Rebuild of Evangelion" anime movie series comes a 1/7 scale figure of Rei Ayanami in her plugsuit! The figure is based on Ayanami's long-haired appearance from the latter half of the film. Her silky white skin, seemingly heart-piercing eyes and graceful long hair that conveys the passage of time have all been captured in figure form with detailed modeling and delicate gradated paintwork. Her innocent and mysterious aura has been faithfully brought into figure form. Be sure to add her to your collection.

products.name: Rebuild of Evangelion Pop Up Parade PVC Statue Asuka Langley 18 cm
products.description:
POP UP PARADE is a series of figures that are easy to collect with affordable prices and speedy releases! Each figure typically stands around 18cm in height and the series features a vast selection of characters from popular anime and game series, with many more to be added soon!

From the popular anime movie series "Rebuild of Evangelion" comes a POP UP PARADE figure of Asuka Langley as she appeared in the film's memorable scene on the beach. Be sure to add her to your collection!

products.name: Shin Evangelion Gekijouban:|| - Makinami Mari LPM Figure
products.description: This PVC figure of Makinami Mari is 23cm high. Limited Edition!

products.name: Code Geass Lelouch of the Rebellion PVC Statue C.C. Swimsuit Ver. 28 cm
products.description: From the anime series "Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion" comes this highly detailed PVC statue. It stands approx. 28 cm tall and comes in a window box packaging.

products.name: One Piece Grandista PVC Statue Trafalgar Law 22 cm
products.description: From Banpresto's "Grandista" series comes this PVC statue. It stands approx. 22 cm tall.

products.name: One Piece  PVC Statue FL Monkey D Luffy  Gear 5 Vol. 1 10 cm
products.description: From Banpresto comes this PVC statue. It stands approx. 10 cm tall.

products.name: One Piece FiguartsZERO PVC Statue Extra Battle Yamato (Raimei Hakke) 16 cm
products.description: YAMATO, the fierce samurai of the "One Piece" series, joins Figuarts ZERO! Swinging her giant Iron club, she unleashes her RAIMEI HAKKE thunderclap attack! This fixed-pose figure utilizes exquisite sculpting and translucent parts to put you in the middle of the action!Set Contents: Main Body (with effects), Stand

products.name: One Piece POP! Movies Vinyl Figure Zoro w/ Enma (GW) Exclusive 9 cm
products.description: From Funko's popular 'POP!' series comes this vinyl figure. Each figure stands approx. 9 cm tall and comes in a window box packaging. Please note: For this item, demand is expected to be higher than the available quantity, which may result in allocations or cancellations of quantities ordered.

products.name: One Piece - King of Artist - The Sanji Wanokuni Figure - 23 cm
products.description: From the "One Piece" anime series comes this PVC Statue. It stands 23 cm tall and comes with base in a box packaging.

products.name: Funko POP! Trafalgar Law Room Attack - One Piece Exclusive
products.description: The Pop! Vinyl figure comes in a displayable window box! It stands approx. 9 cm tall.

products.name: ONE PIECE - POP N° 939 - Shanks W/Chase - Special Edition
products.description: The Pop! Vinyl figure comes in a displayable window box! It stands approx. 9 cm tall.

products.name: ONE PIECE - POP Animation N° 1276 - Buggy The Clown
products.description: Get ready to set sail with this awesome range of One Piece Funko Pop! Vinyls. The whole crew is here, and ready to board The Going Merry with the next destination set for your collection. Charter this range of whacky and absurd sailors, and venture to the ends of the seas in search of the One Piece.

It's a luxurious makeover perfectly suited for this fancy, fan-favorite replica.

Set Contents: Main Body, Stand, 3x 1.5V LR44 batteries (for test purposes only.)

products.name: Mazinger Z Jumbo Machineder Action Figure Great Mazinger 60 cm
products.description:
The second Jumbo Machinder revival project appears from "Great Mazinger" on the 50th anniversary of the TV broadcast! Standard equipment includes two "Mazinger Blades" and the red wing "Scramble Dash"! It has an atomic punch ejection gimmick on both arms, and can be equipped with a "super rapid-fire missile" unit that ejects three missiles on its arms. Also equipped with a large "Mazinger Blade".

Set Contents:

- Body
- Brain Condor
- Scramble dash
- 2 x Mazinger blade small
- Mazinger Blade Large
- Super rapid-fire missile
- 14 x Missile bullet (white wings)
- 6 x Missile bullet (black wings)

products.name: One Piece FiguartsZERO PVC Statue Cotton Candy Lover Chopper 7 cm
products.description:
Popular characters from the Anime edition of One Piece join FigurartsZERO! Tony Tony Chopper, the "Cotton Candy Lover", posed as cute as ever! A special stage included in the set.

It stands approx. 7 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.name: Dandadan Figuarts mini Action Figure Okarun 9 cm
products.description:
Momo from the manga "Dandadan" is the newest member of Bandai's "Figuarts mini" lineup! She's a compact 9cm tall and super-cute, with dramatic painted eyes for a lively appearance, as well as interchangeable arm parts. She's posable at neck, shoulders and legs, too, and a base is included. Order her for your own collection today!

Set Contents:

- Main figure
- Interchangeable arms, left and right
- Base

products.name: Dandadan Figuarts mini Action Figure Momo 9 cm
products.description:

products.name: Macross The Super Dimension Fortress Hi-Metal R Action Figure VF-4 Lightning III -Flash Back 2012- 15 cm
products.description:
Arcadia's 1/60-scale action figure of the VF-4A Lightning III piloted by Hikaru Ichijo in "Super Dimension Fortress Macross: Flashback 2012" is back! It's fully transformable into all three forms (Battroid, Gerwalk and Fighter), and although it comes with no weaponry, it has posable hands and a VF-1 gun pod (GU-11). A pilot figure is also included. Order this iconic space fighter for your own collection today!

Set Contents:

- Main figure
- Pilot figure
- Movable hand parts
- Attachment for stand
- Gun pod
- Marking stickers

products.name: Yu-Gi-Oh! S.H. MonsterArts Action Figure Elemental Hero Flame Wingman 19 cm
products.description:
Celebrate the 20th anniversary of "Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters" with the Elemental Hero Flame Wingman "S.H.MonsterArts" action figure from Bandai! The protagonist Judai's favorite monster features accurate proportions based on thorough research into character materials, and was created with meticulous attention to detail. The proven movable technology of the S.H.MonsterArts series allows for all kinds of dynamic poses! Order him for your own collection today!

Set Contents:

- Main figure
- Interchangeable hands (x1 pair)
- Flame shoot effect parts
- Stand

products.name: Godzilla vs Mechagodzilla DX Soul of Chogokin Diecast Action Figure Mechagodzilla 1974 27 cm
products.description:
Built-in LED and audio IC in a superalloy body with a total height of 270mm. The dorsal fins lined up in a row act as activation switches, and when the power is turned on, it will appear and both eyes will emit light! Roar! "Space beam" sound while both eyes light up multi-colored light! "Cross attack beam" sound when the internal LED lights up in conjunction with the chest hatch deployment! Mechagodzilla's various functions are reproduced with sound and light. Flight form can also be reproduced by replacing the head and tail.

Set Contents:

- Body
- Head for flight mode
- Flight mode tail
- Display base set

products.name: WandaVision Action Figure 1/6 Vision 31 cm
products.description:
Vision is aware of the full trauma Wanda experienced in Avengers: Infinity War, having killed him to prevent Thanos from getting the Mind Stone, but heartbroken and devastated to watch him sacrificed again after the warlord revised time.

Sideshow and Hot Toys are excited to present a fan beloved superhero from WandaVision - Vision Sixth Scale Collectible Figure to expand on your Avengers' display.

Meticulously crafted based on the screen appearance of Vision in WandaVision series, the figure features an impressive head sculpt and the Mind Stone with stunning details reflecting the android's mechanical features, a highly-poseable specialized body, skillfully tailored outfit with cape attached, several interchangeable hands, a specially designed figure stand, and a Hex themed backdrop to recreate the scene.

Don't miss the chance to recruit this android figure to your WandaVision collection!

products.name: Marvel The Origins Collection Comic Masterpiece Action Figure 1/6 Iron Man 33 cm
products.description:
Iron Man is one of the greatest heroes in the Marvel Universe! Having created a wondrous suit of armor in the workshop to keep himself alive, Tony has revised it dozens of times, each version with increased capabilities, faster operation, reduced energy usage, and adaptability to the greatest threats the universe has to offer.

Going back to the origins of our favorite superheroes, Hot Toys is bringing The Origins Collection which takes inspiration from the pages of classic Marvel Comics. Proudly presenting to fans today, the red and gold Iron Man Suit Armor as a 1/6th scale collectible diecast figure that comes with reimagined crystal armors.

Crafted based on Iron Man in Marvel Comics with stunning details, the figure features a newly crafted helmet head with LED-light up function; intricate design of the Iron Man armor and structure illustrating its mechanical detail; beautifully painted in red and gold coloring with a metallic appearance; crystal clear armor parts and interchangeable mask and armor parts for different styles of display; LED light-up functions scattered throughout the upper body, Arc Reactor on chest and palms; multiple pairs of interchangeable hands for iconic poses.

Give a stylish upgrade to your collection with this Armored Avenger figure!

products.name: Marvel The Origins Collection Comic Masterpiece Action Figure 1/6 Iron Man Deluxe Version 33 cm
products.description:
The appearance of Iron Man in the 1960s did not only introduce a wardrobe of high-tech armored suits to fans, but also maintained a regular presence among the members of Avengers. His hulking gray costume in the early days was later redesigned to an ever-sleeker suit of armor that hewed to a red and gold color theme which is still significant until today.

Going back to the origins of our favorite superheroes, Hot Toys is bringing The Origins Collection which takes inspiration from the pages of classic Marvel Comics.

To kick off the collection, Sideshow and Hot Toys is pleased to introduce the Iron Man Suit Armor (Deluxe Version) as a diecast sixth scale collectible figure with re-imagined crystal armors, and a specially designed Tony Stark's Workshop themed diorama base to enhance the collecting experience.

Exquisitely crafted based on Iron Man in Marvel Comics, the highly detailed figure features a newly crafted helmet head with LED-light up function; intricate design of the Iron Man armor and structure illustrating its mechanical detail; carefully painted in red and gold coloring with a metallic appearance; crystal clear armor parts, interchangeable mask and armor parts for different styles of display; LED light-up functions scattered throughout the upper body, Arc Reactor on chest and palms; multiple pairs of interchangeable hands for iconic poses.

The deluxe version includes a signature Iron Man suitcase with articulated function, also an elaborated diorama figure base with LED light-up function, allowing fans to explore Tony Stark's high-tech workshop straight from the comic pages, includes articulated gantry arms, extra armor parts, and holographic screen accessories.

Suit up your Marvel collection with the one-of-a-kind Iron Man figure!

products.name: Star Wars The Mandalorian Action Figure 1/6 Moff Gideon 29 cm
products.description:
"You have something I want. You may think you have some idea of what you are in possession of, but you do not. In a few moments, it will be mine."

Imperial Moff Gideon™ is fiercely determined to capture a specific quarry. Clever and formidable, Gideon values power and knowledge.

Sideshow and Hot Toys are excited to be further expanding The Mandalorian collectible series by officially presenting the new Moff Gideon Sixth Scale Collectible Figure inspired by the acclaimed Star Wars™ series The Mandalorian™.

The highly-accurate collectible figure is meticulously crafted based on Gideon's appearance in the series featuring a newly developed head sculpt with astonishing likeness, skillfully tailored outfit and cape, the iconic darksaber with interchangeable blades, a blaster, and a display base!

This intimidating imperial officer will make a great addition to your Star Wars collection!

products.name: Star Wars The Mandalorian Action Figure 1/6 Dark Trooper 32 cm
products.description:
"You're about to face off with the Dark Troopers. You had your hands full with one. Let's see how you do against a platoon." - Moff Gideon™

The third-generation design Dark Troopers are no longer suits. The human inside was the final weakness to be solved. They are now droids. These troopers proved to be very intimidating and dangerous as the Mandalorian struggled to defeat even one of these fearsome foes during his rescue mission of Grogu aboard from Moff Gideon's ship.

Following the epic season finale of The Mandalorian, Sideshow and Hot Toys present the brand new Dark Trooper Sixth Scale Collectible Figure!

The highly-accurate collectible figure is skillfully crafted based on the Dark Trooper as seen in the hit Star Wars™ series. It features highly detailed helmet and mechanical armor parts, specially applied black armor painting, LED light-up functions, a blaster, and a display base!

This menacing trooper will surely be a welcomed addition to any Star Wars collection!

products.name: Star Wars The Mandalorian Action Figures 1/6 Grogu
products.description:
"It is a foundling. By creed, it is in your care."

The highly acclaimed Star Wars live-action series The Mandalorian has introduced us to a widely beloved character, Grogu, the mysterious alien child pursued by bounty hunters on behalf of Imperial interests.

Celebrating Star Wars Day, Sideshow and Hot Toys is excited to present a special Grogu Sixth Scale Collectible Figure Set and unique creatures seen in The Mandalorian.

This 1:6th scale collectible set features the skillfully crafted Grogu in 3 different poses, two styles of prams, a loth-cat, and a one-eyed frog making them great complements to your Mandalorian display!

Take care of this little one in your Star Wars collection today!

products.name: HOT908858 Star Wars The Mandalorian AF 1/6 Boba Fett (Repaint Armor] and Throne
products.description: Manufacturer:Hot ToysCode:HOT908858Height:30cmCHOKING HAZARD:This product may contain small parts. It is not a toy and only suitable for the persons over 15 years old.  "Boba. I thought you were dead. I'm so glad to see you. I had heard many rumors."With his customized MandalorianTM armor, deadly weaponry, and silent demeanor, Boba FettTM was one of the most feared bounty hunters in the galaxy. Over the course of his career, which included contracts for the Empire and the criminal underworld, he became a legend, but many thought he met his end when he fell in the horrific Sarlacc pit on TatooineTM. After making a surprise return in The Mandalorian and regained his armor, he set his eyes to dispose of Bib FortunaTM and took the throne!Now Hot Toys is thrilled to bring yet another incredible addition to The Mandalorian collectible series and officially present the 1/6th scale Boba FettTM (Repaint Armor) and Throne Collectible Set!The figure features a meticulously crafted Mandalorian helmet and armor with exceptional paint application, Boba's iconic jetpack, skillfully tailored outfit, a flamethrower effect, a fibercord whip, a blaster, a rifle, and display base!This collectible set will specially feature a newly painted head sculpt with astonishing likeness, and a highly detailed throne for Boba Fett.Don't wait and miss out on the opportunity to add this awe-inspiring collectible set to your treasured display!
